feed.title: LockML — Open Source ML Model Comparison Table Blog

author.name: LockML — Open Source ML Model Comparison Table

entry.title: Open Source Models That Beat GPT-4 on Specific Tasks — LockML
entry.summary: Real benchmark data showing where Llama 3, DeepSeek, Qwen 2, and other open models outperform GPT-4 on coding, math, and multilingual tasks.

entry.title: How to Choose the Right ML Model for Your Use Case — LockML
entry.summary: A practical framework for choosing between open-source ML models. Covers parameters, licensing, deployment, benchmarks, and cost.
